---
title: "Address → Map → Census data"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
runtime: shiny
---

```{r}
# Install missing packages (uncomment if you want automatic installs - optional)
# pkgs <- c("shiny","leaflet","httr","jsonlite","tidycensus","dplyr","tidyr","DT","shinycssloaders","sf")
# missing <- pkgs[!(pkgs %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
# if(length(missing)) install.packages(missing)
```

```{r setup}
library(shiny)
library(leaflet)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(tidycensus)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DT)
library(shinycssloaders)
library(sf)

# load helper functions
source("R/helpers.R")
```

UI
```{r}
fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Address → Map → Census data"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      textInput("address", "Type an address (one line):", value = "1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington, DC 20500"),
      actionButton("go", "Locate address"),
      br(),
      br(),
      helpText("This app geocodes the address using the US Census Geocoder and pulls ACS variables for the containing Census tract using tidycensus."),
      helpText("Set your Census API key before running (see README).")
    ),
    mainPanel(
      tabsetPanel(
        tabPanel("Map",
                 withSpinner(leafletOutput("map", height = "600px"))),
        tabPanel("Census summary",
                 br(),
                 withSpinner(tableOutput("summary")),
                 br(),
                 h4("Raw ACS data"),
                 withSpinner(DTOutput("acs_table"))
        ),
        tabPanel("Raw geocode result",
                 verbatimTextOutput("raw"))
      )
    )
  )
)
```

Server
```{r}
function(input, output, session) {

  # Reactive to hold the geocode + ACS results
  state <- reactiveValues(result = NULL, acs = NULL, tract_geom = NULL)

  observeEvent(input$go, {
    addr <- input$address
    if(nchar(trimws(addr)) == 0) return()

    # Geocode via Census Geocoder
    geocode_res <- tryCatch({
      geocode_census(addr)
    }, error = function(e) {
      showNotification(paste("Geocode error:", e$message), type = "error")
      return(NULL)
    })

    if(is.null(geocode_res) || is.null(geocode_res$addressMatches) || length(geocode_res$addressMatches) == 0) {
      showNotification("No geocode match found.", type = "warning")
      state$result <- NULL
      return()
    }

    match <- geocode_res$addressMatches[[1]]
    # coordinates
    lon <- as.numeric(match$coordinates$x)
    lat <- as.numeric(match$coordinates$y)
    formatted <- match$matchedAddress

    # get tract GEOID if available
    tract_geoid <- NA_character_
    state_fips <- NA_character_
    county_fips <- NA_character_
    tract_code <- NA_character_
    if(!is.null(match$geographies$`Census Tracts`)) {
      ct <- match$geographies$`Census Tracts`[[1]]
      tract_geoid <- ct$GEOID
      # GEOID is 11-digit: state(2) + county(3) + tract(6)
      if(!is.null(tract_geoid) && nchar(tract_geoid) >= 11) {
        state_fips <- substr(tract_geoid, 1, 2)
        county_fips <- substr(tract_geoid, 3, 5)
        tract_code <- substr(tract_geoid, 6, 11)
      }
    }

    state$result <- list(lat = lat, lon = lon, formatted = formatted, geocode = match, tract_geoid = tract_geoid, state_fips = state_fips, county_fips = county_fips, tract_code = tract_code)

    # If we have tract GEOID, fetch ACS variables (with geometry for map overlay)
    if(!is.na(tract_geoid) && !is.na(state_fips) && !is.na(county_fips) && !is.na(tract_code)) {
      # variables to fetch
      vars <- c(
        total_pop = "B01003_001",
        median_income = "B19013_001",
        median_age = "B01002_001",
        white = "B02001_002",
        black = "B02001_003",
        asian = "B02001_005",
        hispanic = "B03002_012"
      )
      acs_data <- tryCatch({
        get_acs_for_tract(state_fips, county_fips, tract_code, vars)
      }, error = function(e) {
        showNotification(paste("ACS fetch error:", e$message), type = "error")
        return(NULL)
      })

      state$acs <- acs_data$summary_table
      state$tract_geom <- acs_data$geometry
    } else {
      state$acs <- NULL
      state$tract_geom <- NULL
    }

  })

  # Map output
  output$map <- renderLeaflet({
    req(state$result)
    lat <- state$result$lat
    lon <- state$result$lon
    formatted <- state$result$formatted

    m <- leaflet() %>%
      addTiles() %>%
      setView(lng = lon, lat = lat, zoom = 16) %>%
      addMarkers(lng = lon, lat = lat, popup = formatted)

    # add tract polygon if available
    if(!is.null(state$tract_geom) && inherits(state$tract_geom, "sf")) {
      m <- m %>%
        addPolygons(data = st_transform(state$tract_geom, 4326),
                    color = "blue",
                    weight = 2,
                    fill = FALSE,
                    popup = paste0("Tract: ", state$result$tract_geoid))
    }
    m
  })

  # Summary table (key metrics)
  output$summary <- renderTable({
    req(state$acs)
    # create a concise key-value summary
    df <- state$acs %>%
      select(metric, estimate) %>%
      mutate(estimate = ifelse(metric %in% c("white","black","asian","hispanic"), paste0(round(estimate,0)), as.character(round(estimate,0)))) %>%
      rename("Metric" = metric, "Estimate" = estimate)
    df
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE)

  # Full ACS data table
  output$acs_table <- renderDT({
    req(state$acs)
    dat <- state$acs %>% mutate(estimate = round(estimate,0), moe = round(moe,0))
    datatable(dat, options = list(pageLength = 10))
  })

  output$raw <- renderPrint({
    req(state$result)
    str(state$result$geocode, max.level = 2)
  })

}
```
